sql_array: SELECT toInt128OrDefault(value, CAST('-1', 'Int128')) AS converted_value FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET value = toString(toInt128OrDefault(value, CAST('0', 'Int128'))) WHERE value LIKE '10%';
SELECT value, toInt128OrDefault(value) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE toInt128OrDefault(value) > 0;
